summary: The Isthmus withdrawals-root validation divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in two mismatch error returns; no validation behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 214: M	crates/optimism/consensus/src/validation/isthmus.rs.
The isolated patch only changes two `return Err(OpConsensusError::L2WithdrawalsRootMismatch { ... })` expressions to semicolon-terminated statements.
No storage-root comparison, error payload, or validation outcome changed.
